sentence: 我们队终于打赢了这场比赛。
pinyin: Wǒmen duì zhōngyú dǎyíng le zhè chǎng bǐsài.
english: Our team finally won the match.

sentence: 那段变乱的岁月里，很多家庭都失散了。
pinyin: Nà duàn biàn luàn de suì yuè lǐ, hěn duō jiā tíng dōu shī sàn le.
english: During that period of turmoil, many families were separated.

meaning: to open one's heart; to have a heart-to-heart conversation
sentence: 和老朋友喝茶聊天，彼此交心，感觉很轻松。
pinyin: Hé lǎo péng yǒu hē chá liáo tiān, bǐ cǐ jiāo xīn, gǎn jué hěn qīng sōng.
english: Having tea and chatting with an old friend and opening our hearts to each other felt very relaxing.

meaning: to be affiliated with; to operate under the wing of; affiliation
sentence: 这家小公司挂靠在一所大学名下经营。
pinyin: Zhè jiā xiǎo gōng sī guà kào zài yī suǒ dà xué míng xià jīng yíng.
english: This small company operates under the affiliation of a university.

meaning: to put together; to add; to merge
sentence: 两个部门归并成了一个，减少了不少麻烦。
pinyin: Liǎng gè bù mén guī bìng chéng le yī gè, jiǎn shǎo le bù shǎo má fán.
english: The two departments were merged into one, cutting out a lot of hassle.
